themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 7 verses. Commentary leans on "God commands: 'That ye may remember, and do all my commandments, and be holy unto your God.'...". Word-study detail reinforces "מִצְוָת֖וֹ: his commandment - a command, whether human or divine (collectively, the law)".
